embed.title: # Legal Information
embed.desc: Here are the legal documents for {username}. Please read them carefully.

error.fetch: ❌ Failed to fetch the Terms of Service. Please try again later.

embed.title: ## {username} is here!
embed.desc:
helloo i'm {username}, your all-in-one cutie bot 
i was born on `27/05/2022` and since then i've been growing with lots of lovee 

my amazing onii-chan is **kenndeclouv** >,<, you can dm them if you need help, wanna talk tech stuff, or even collab on something cool!

i love making your server more fun, organized, and cozy! from utilities to cute interactions, i'll always try to make things easier and sweeter for you ><

wanna invite me to your server or check out my website? just click the buttons below and let’s be friends!

docs.unavailable: 📂 Documentation is not yet available for this category.

embed.desc:
## {username} help you
**Welcome to the bot help center!**

### Quick Tips:
• Select a category below to see the command list and explanations.
• Click a command name for more details (if available).
• Use / in chat to auto-complete commands.

### **Statistics:**
• Total categories: **{category_count}**
• Total commands: **{command_count}**

### **Need more help?**
• Join the support server: [Click here]({supportServer})
• Kythia's Website: [Click here]({botWebsite})

-# **Select a category below to see the help!**

category.desc: All help commands in {category} Command From Core command

embed.desc:
## 📊 **{username} Statistics**

> **Uptime:** `{uptime}`
> **Memory Usage:** `{memory} MB`
> **Servers:** `{guilds}`   |   **Users:** `{users}`
> **Kythia Version:** `{kythiaVersion}`
> **Kythia Core:** `{kythiaCoreVersion}`
> **Commit hash:** `{githubCommit}`

### `⚙️` **Technology**
> {runtime}  |   **discord.js:** `v{djs}`
> **CPU:** `{cpu}`

### `🗄️` **Cache**
{cacheStatus}
> **Hits:** `{cacheHits}`   |   **Misses:** `{cacheMisses}`

### `👑` **Owner**

webhook.desc:
## **❌ {bot}** OUT FROM SERVER
**{bot}** has left the server:
• Server Name: **{guild}**
• Server ID: `{guildId}`
• Server Owner: <@{ownerId}> ({ownerId})
• Member Count: {memberCount}
• Server Created At: {createdAt}

welcome.desc:
## 🎉 Thank you for inviting me!
Hello everyone! I'm **{bot}** and I'm ready to help your server!

Here are some steps to get started:
• Use `/help` to see all my features and commands.
• Configure your server settings with `/set view` (admin only).
• Visit my website at [kythia.my.id](https://kythia.my.id/commands) for documentation and more info.

If you need help, just mention me or contact my owner `kenndeclouv`!
welcome.fallback:
## 🎉 Thank you for inviting me!
Hello everyone! I'm **{bot}** and I'm ready to help your server!

Here are some steps to get started:
• Use `/help` to see all my features and commands.
• Configure your server settings with `/set view` (admin only).
• Visit my website at [kythia.my.id](https://kythia.my.id/commands) for documentation and more info.

If you need help, just mention me or contact my owner `kenndeclouv`!

min.members:
## {bot} Leave!
Sorry, I only join servers with at least **{threshold} members**.
Feel free to invite me back once your server has grown — I'd love to be part of your community!

link.detected: 🚨 Link detected! Sharing links is not allowed.

emojispam.detected: 🚨 Emoji spam detected! Please avoid overusing emojis.

zalgo.detected: 🚨 Zalgo text detected! Please use normal characters.

spam.short: 🚨 Spam detected! Please avoid excessive spam.
spam.duplicate: 🚨 Duplicate message detected! Please avoid excessive duplicate messages.
spam.fast: 🚨 Fast message detected! Please avoid excessive fast messages.
spam.generic: 🚨 Spam detected! Please avoid excessive spam.
